About CAFIA

Center for Africa Financial Inclusion and Advancement

Who We Are

CAFIA is an integrated solutions platform, building the systems that help MSMEs and informal workers become visible, financially included, and economically resilient, including resilience to health shocks. Based in Sierra Leone with a continental vision, we connect research intelligence, technology innovation, enterprise development, and health inclusion to create pathways from survival to sustainable growth.

Why CAFIA is Different

  • •Enterprise Pathway Focus – We support businesses at every stage, from informal vendors and survival enterprises to scaling MSMEs seeking growth.
  • •From Invisible to Investable – Turning hidden economies into measurable opportunities and impact.
  • •Multi-Stakeholder Bridge – Connecting governments, banks, investors, and entrepreneurs into one ecosystem.
  • •Pan-African Vision – Starting in Sierra Leone, scaling across West Africa and beyond.

Our Mission

To advance inclusive economic growth across Africa by connecting data, innovation, and action. We deliver research, technology solutions, advisory services, and capacity-building programs that strengthen households, enterprises, and institutions.

Our Vision

An Africa where no enterprise remains invisible, where every household, entrepreneur, and business has the data, tools, and opportunities to thrive in a digital, inclusive financial system.

Who We Serve

Governments & Central Banks

Data and policy intelligence for effective inclusion strategies.

Development Partners

Ground-truth insights to ensure measurable impact.

Private Sector

Market intelligence and SME pipelines to de-risk expansion for banks, MFIs, and fintechs.

SMEs & Survival Enterprises

Literacy, training, and pathways to finance.

Investors

High-potential deal flow and due diligence insights.

Impact Funds

Curated SME pipelines and investment intelligence reports.

Our Leadership Team

Parvinjeet Kaur

Chief Executive Officer

MBA (ASB–MIT Sloan) | ACCA | Inclusive Finance Architect | Ecosystem Builder

Parvinjeet Kaur is the Founder and Chief Executive Officer of CAFIA. With an MBA from MIT Sloan School of Management and ACCA qualification, she is a leading architect of inclusive finance ecosystems in Africa.

Assoc. Professor Dr.Muhammad-Abbas Conteh

Director of Health Policy & Inclusion

MD | ABIM | Physician | Health Systems & Policy Specialist

Dr. Muhammad-Abbas Conteh is a physician and health systems specialist who leads CAFIA's health inclusion initiatives, connecting healthcare access with financial resilience.

Alim Ismael Kamara

Director of Technology

Computer Engineer | Full-Stack Developer | AI Innovation Specialist

Alim Ismael Kamara is a computer engineer and full-stack developer who leads CAFIA's technology innovation, building digital platforms that connect data, enterprises, and financial services.

CAFIA

Center for Africa Financial Inclusion and Advancement. Transforming Africa's informal sector into a catalyst for inclusive economic growth.
